gatling-maven-scaffold/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
gatling-maven-scaffold/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific APIs are used.

gatling-maven-scaffold/pom.xml.general_idea: Bump the maven-compiler-plugin version to a snapshot release compatible with Java 21.
